TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dalibor Bagarić sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1980, byacing te 2 ru 7 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga West Germany, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 216 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 132 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2000 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *aliβor βaɣari* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa wes~ɕt ɣermanj, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Dalibor Bagarić sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1980, byacing te 2 ru 7 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga West Germany, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 216 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 132 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2000 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *aliβor βaɣari* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa wes~ɕt ɣermanj, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
